{# vendor_card.html — Rich card for vendor grid view. Shows vendor name, score bar, brand/commodity tags, strategic claim badge, rating stars, and key stats. Called by: vendors/list.html (card grid mode) Depends on: brand palette, Alpine.js Context vars: v (VendorCard), claim_map (dict of vendor_card_id -> {user_name, days_left}) #}
{# Row 1: Vendor name + strategic badge #}

{{ v.display_name }}

{% if v.domain %}

{{ v.domain }}

{% endif %}
{% set claim = claim_map.get(v.id) if claim_map else None %} {% if claim %} Strategic ({{ claim.user_name }}) {% elif v.is_blacklisted %} Blacklisted {% endif %}
{# Row 2: Score bar #} {% if v.vendor_score %}
Score {{ '%.0f'|format(v.vendor_score) }}
{% else %}

New — no score yet

{% endif %} {# Row 3: Brand + commodity tags #} {% if v.brand_tags or v.commodity_tags %}
{% for tag in (v.brand_tags or [])[:5] %} {{ tag }} {% endfor %} {% if (v.brand_tags or [])|length > 5 %} +{{ (v.brand_tags|length) - 5 }} more {% endif %} {% for tag in (v.commodity_tags or [])[:4] %} {{ tag }} {% endfor %} {% if (v.commodity_tags or [])|length > 4 %} +{{ (v.commodity_tags|length) - 4 }} more {% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Row 4: Rating stars #} {% if v.avg_rating %}
{% for i in range(1, 6) %} {% if i <= (v.avg_rating|round|int) %} {% else %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if v.review_count %}({{ v.review_count }}){% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Row 5: Stats #}
{{ v.sighting_count or 0 }} sightings {{ '%.0f%%'|format((v.overall_win_rate or 0) * 100) }} win {{ '%.0f%%'|format((v.response_rate or 0) * 100) }} resp
{# Row 6: Location + industry #} {% if v.hq_country or v.industry %}
{{ v.hq_country or '' }}{% if v.hq_country and v.industry %} · {% endif %}{{ v.industry or '' }}
{% endif %}
